name: The Flora Maid Service
description:
(Left to right: Lycoris, Veronica, Lily) Three very diligent and professional maids who are here to take care of any of your household chores - cooking, cleaning, repair, security, subduing your assassins, you name it. (From the game Counterside. Counter POV.)

Mone is not included, which is why the picture looks like it's been cut.
creator: k5G555
